description_long: This object is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle featuring a black metal receiver and barrel assembly, complemented by a wooden handguard and a curved wooden magazine. The rifle is equipped with a skeletonized folding metal stock, which is characteristic of compact, portable variants. The front sight is a standard post, while the rear sight is a notched tangent, both made of metal. The pistol grip is made of dark polymer or bakelite, providing ergonomic handling. The overall finish is a mix of matte black metal and polished wood, with visible screws, pins, and mechanical details typical of military rifles.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a black metal body, wooden handguard and magazine, and a folding skeleton stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, wooden handguard, curved magazine, and folding skeleton stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel muzzle, front sight post, and narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine release, and the full length of the folding stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure, rear sight, and the alignment of the receiver.
